steps.title: Find the negative value
steps.content: The sentence asks for a neighboring species with a negative effect value. In the table, leafy spurge is listed as a neighboring species with an effect value of -0.3238, the only negative value.

steps.title: Reject positive or target entries
steps.content: A has a positive effect value of 0.3580. B has a positive effect value of 0.2523. C is listed as a target species, not the neighboring species for the negative row. The answer is D.
